---
title: "Lesson 1"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# **Lesson 1: Getting Started: Basic R**

## **Overview**

Our main goal here is to become familiar with basic operations in R.

We'll be using Chapter 1 of [**Essential R**](https://online.stat.psu.edu/stat484/lesson/essential-r-notes-learning-r "Essential R - Notes on learning R").

## **Data and R Code Files**

The R code file and data files for this lesson can be found on the [**Essential R - Notes on learning R**](https://online.stat.psu.edu/stat484/lesson/essential-r-notes-learning-r) page.

-   [1.1 - Introduction to R Studio](https://online.stat.psu.edu/stat484/lesson/1/1.1)

-   [1.2 - Introduction to the Console - Part 1](https://online.stat.psu.edu/stat484/lesson/1/1.2/1.2.1)

-   [1.3 - Introduction to the Console - Part 2](https://online.stat.psu.edu/stat484/lesson/1/1.3/1.3.2)

-   [1.4 - Creating Vectors](https://online.stat.psu.edu/stat484/lesson/1/1.4)

-   [1.5 - Indexing Vectors & Logical Extraction](https://online.stat.psu.edu/stat484/lesson/1/1.5)

-   [1.6 - Operations with Vectors](https://online.stat.psu.edu/stat484/lesson/1/1.6)

-   [1.7 - Basic Loops in R](https://online.stat.psu.edu/stat484/lesson/1/1.7)

-   [1.8 - Schematic of R Work-flow](https://online.stat.psu.edu/stat484/lesson/1/1.8)

## **Book traversal links for Lesson 1: Getting Started: Basic R**

-
